# CAT-G-004 - Research & Development Tax Incentive (RDTI)

| Field | Value |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Funder** | Inland Revenue / MBIE policy |
| **Status** | **OPEN** ongoing |
| **URL** | https://www.rdti.govt.nz/ |
| **Benefit** | **15%** tax credit on eligible R&D expenditure |
| **Fit score** | **85** - stack after / alongside structured R&D |

## Role in CAT pipeline

Not a cash grant. Use after New to R&D capability is in place (or in parallel if already eligible). New to R&D includes an intro session with the RDTI team - book it.

## Next steps

1. Map eligible R&D cost categories for Core / Weaver / Aether 
2. Ensure timesheets and project accounting capture R&D vs BAU 
3. Engage RDTI guidance early to avoid ineligible claims

- rdti.govt.nz
